agentic-engineer.description: Expert AI Agent Engineer for designing, building, and deploying AI agents, skills, and multi-agent systems

webdev-agent.description: World-class full-stack web development architect. Use for ANY coding task — websites, web apps, APIs, CLIs, libraries, infrastructure, DevOps, performance, accessibility, security, testing, and system design. Covers the entire modern web stack across 20+ languages and every major framework, cloud, and deployment target. Enforces OWASP security, WCAG accessibility, and production-grade engineering standards on every task.
